# Sample App

A sample Express API with user authentication and task management.

## Setup

```bash
npm install
npm start
```

## API

- `POST /auth/login` тАФ Authenticate user
- `POST /auth/register` тАФ Register new user
- `GET /tasks` тАФ List tasks
- `POST /tasks` тАФ Create task
- `PUT /tasks/:id` тАФ Update task
- `DELETE /tasks/:id` тАФ Delete task
